---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for PromptLint
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Frame it from the user's perspective: "As a developer using LLM APIs, I want…"

## Proposed solution

Describe the proposed behavior and how it would work.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one preferred?

## Use cases

Concrete scenarios in which this would be used.

## Out of scope check

Confirm this is consistent with the V1 scope documented in `README.md` and `docs/`. If not, file as a V2/V3 idea instead.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links, or examples.
